creator: pol.dellaiera@protonmail.com
text:
Hi,

This is my first bug report here, I'm using FreeBSD since 3 weeks now and I was unable to login to my Google Account using Chrome Settings page.

To reproduce the issue:

1) Enable two step authentication on your Google Account: https://myaccount.google.com/signinoptions/two-step-verification/enroll-welcome
2) Start Chromium from FreeBSD 11 or 12 with a complete new profile
3) Click on the small icon to login on the top right of the Chromium window.
4) Enter your email
5) Enter your password
6) There is a small popup asking you to type in the second authentication factor, and it's when Chromium quit without notice.

I've ran Chromium in gdb and reproduced the issue, I don't know if it might help you, the link to see the log is here: https://pastebin.com/7JJwrxqm

If you need more information, just let me know.
